title: cyclobalanopsis dongfangensis
intro: Cyclobalanopsis dongfangensis, also known as Dongfang huanxiang, is a species of deciduous tree native to southern China, belonging to the family Fagaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough, and improving immune function. Cyclobalanopsis dongfangensis is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
